verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted
verdicts.reason: Subdued, warm, fits downtempo mood without cheap filters.

verdicts.name: scout_cool_mid_muted
verdicts.reason: Too cool; feels detached, lacks emotional depth.

verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted_2
verdicts.reason: Similar to first but slightly less cohesive.

verdicts.name: scout_green_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Green cast unnatural; distracts from intended mood.

verdicts.name: scout_neutral_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Flat, lacks cinematic depth; feels generic.

verdicts.name: scout_warm_mid_soft
verdicts.reason: Soft but washed out; missing contrast.
